title: Functions, Scope, and Callable Contracts · Behavior Case: Python Function Annotations
summary: Refactor the routing engine into testable calculations, validators, and reporting functions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python function annotations increment in a function-oriented support workflow. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write modern annotations for function inputs and outputs while recognizing that Python does not enforce them at runtime.
Use closures, functions as values, lambda expressions, and higher-order operations when they simplify a stable behavior boundary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
